title: An apparatus and method for optimized clinical data generation
abstract: There is provided a computer-implemented method for generating optimized clinical data. Clinical data associated with one or more subjects is acquired, and the clinical data associated with a subject comprises a plurality of data sets each associated with a clinical attribute of the subject. One or more clinical attribute criteria is acquired. For each of the one or more subjects, one or more data sets from the plurality of data sets is selected based on the one or more clinical attribute criteria. For each of the selected one or more data sets, one or more statistical representations of the data set is generated.
